---
description: Роутер по command-spec файлам (slash commands).
status: active
---
<!-- Generated by memobank init-mb.js. Safe to overwrite with init-mb.js --sync. -->
# Commands

- [.memory-bank/commands/add-tests.md](add-tests.md): Добавление тестов — unit/integration/e2e с приоритезацией по core value.
- [.memory-bank/commands/analysis.md](analysis.md): Optional Analysis router before PRD; recommends brainstorm, brief, write-prd, PRD decomposition, mapping, or feature clarification.
- [.memory-bank/commands/autonomous.md](autonomous.md): Полный автономный прогон PRD → FT → TASKs → execute/verify/review до terminal state.
- [.memory-bank/commands/autopilot.md](autopilot.md): Автономный прогон JSON task queue (TASK-*) в чистых сессиях Codex/Claude.
- [.memory-bank/commands/brainstorm.md](brainstorm.md): Facilitated ideation report before Product Brief; AI coaches, user intent drives.
- [.memory-bank/commands/brief.md](brief.md): Create or update a concise Product Brief as the PRD input contract.
- [.memory-bank/commands/clarify-feature.md](clarify-feature.md): Optional feature-level clarification for one feature before task decomposition when needed.
- [.memory-bank/commands/cold-start.md](cold-start.md): Единая точка входа — выбрать сценарий и запустить правильный флоу (analysis / PRD / map-codebase / skeleton-only).
- [.memory-bank/commands/constitution.md](constitution.md): Run a contextual interview and maintain the Project Constitution governing layer.
- [.memory-bank/commands/discuss.md](discuss.md): Прояснение неизвестных и противоречий перед реализацией — вопросы и decision log.
- [.memory-bank/commands/execute.md](execute.md): Выполнение одной TASK-XXX как implementation handoff: read -> preflight -> protocol -> implement -> local gates -> evidence -> handoff.
- [.memory-bank/commands/find-skills.md](find-skills.md): Поиск релевантных skills: сначала установленные в проекте, потом marketplace.
- [.memory-bank/commands/map-codebase.md](map-codebase.md): Маппинг существующего репозитория в Memory Bank (brownfield → baseline docs).
- [.memory-bank/commands/mb.md](mb.md): Прайминг агента — загрузка контекста проекта из Memory Bank перед работой.
- [.memory-bank/commands/mb-doctor.md](mb-doctor.md): Deterministic Memory Bank readiness gate over mb-lint for autonomous/autopilot execution.
- [.memory-bank/commands/mb-garden.md](mb-garden.md): Регулярное обслуживание Memory Bank: линт, чистка, архивация, устранение drift.
- [.memory-bank/commands/mb-harness.md](mb-harness.md): Хелпер по harness-настройкам: чистые сессии, профили Codex, детерминированные гейты.
- [.memory-bank/commands/mb-init.md](mb-init.md): Инициализировать skeleton Memory Bank. По сути это init-mb.js + базовые файлы.
- [.memory-bank/commands/mb-packet.md](mb-packet.md): Repair or refresh a derivative Execution Packet for one TASK.
- [.memory-bank/commands/mb-sync.md](mb-sync.md): Синхронизация Memory Bank после изменения: обновить индексы, RTM/task records и changelog.
- [.memory-bank/commands/prd.md](prd.md): Decompose a clarified PRD into Memory Bank product, requirements, epics, and features.
- [.memory-bank/commands/prd-to-tasks.md](prd-to-tasks.md): Декомпозиция фичи в implementation plan и атомарные задачи (waves).
- [.memory-bank/commands/red-verify.md](red-verify.md): Adversarial semantic verification задачи (TASK-XXX) для поиска "дисциплинированно, но по существу неверно".
- [.memory-bank/commands/review.md](review.md): Multi-expert ревью Memory Bank (fresh context) с артефактами в .tasks/TASK-MB-REVIEW/.
- [.memory-bank/commands/spec-auto.md](spec-auto.md): Autonomous SDD Design Specs workflow for pre-PRD framing, global backbone, and feature design.
- [.memory-bank/commands/spec-design.md](spec-design.md): Mandatory global SDD architecture backbone gate after PRD decomposition and before feature task design.
- [.memory-bank/commands/spec-improve.md](spec-improve.md): Standalone repair/advanced command for one feature's SDD design.
- [.memory-bank/commands/spec-init.md](spec-init.md): Frame pre-PRD domain, scenario, constraints, and spec context before PRD decomposition.
- [.memory-bank/commands/verify.md](verify.md): Верификация выполненной задачи по acceptance criteria + evidence, итог PASS/FAIL.
- [.memory-bank/commands/write-prd.md](write-prd.md): Turn Product Brief + Constitution + optional context into a clarified PRD.
